projectDetail.separation: Built with a clear separation of responsibilities:
projectDetail.layer1Desc: The Next.js proxy reads the Host (e.g. bodega-x.lvh.me), validates the JWT cookie and dynamically rewrites the route.
projectDetail.layer2Desc: Renders the Dashboard or POS. Manages global state with Zustand and intercepts 401 responses for immediate auto-logout if the token expires.
projectDetail.layer3Desc: Filters malicious requests with @nestjs/throttler. The JwtAuthGuard extracts the tenant ID and the SubscriptionGuard blocks writes if the grace period has expired.
projectDetail.layer4Desc: TypeORM executes the query inside a transaction where SET LOCAL app.current_warehouse_id is run. The database applies isolation (Row-Level Security) natively.
